characters.name: Little My
characters.description: Little MyBasic InformationFamilyMymble(mother)Snufkin(brother)Unnamed siblingsNicknamesMy (various)Little one (Snufkin, Moomintroll)Little Mymble (Snufkin)My tormentor (Muskrat)Filthy child (Mrs. Fillyjonk)Savage (Moomintroll)Tiny mermaid (the Lighthouse Keeper)Mini mermaid (the Lighthouse Keeper)Little mermaid (the Lighthouse Keeper)Fine young sea witch (the Lighthouse Keeper)Little sea urchin (the Lighthouse Keeper)Gull's egg (the Lighthouse Keeper, herself)Physical FeaturesGenderFemaleEye ColorGreenHair ColorAuburnSpeciesMymbleOtherDebut EpisodeLittle My Moves InVoice ActressBel Powley Snufkin(brother) Unnamed siblings Little My, despite her size, is very fierce. She is highly independent and unafraid to take charge, going so far as to speak for all of her siblings and act as their leader. She is mischievous and mean, though sometimes she is mean for the sake of others and with good intentions. She laughs atMoomintroll's bad poetry and saysNinnymust look an "awful fright" if she's invisible and that she won't have a face until she learns to stand up for herself. Other times, she is mean for the sake of being mean, like sprayingSniffwith water or stealing Moomintroll's room and the interior ofMoominhouse. She is surprisingly observant. She often talks about ants and how she eats them.
